response.justification: Bogdan possesses an impressive technical background with over 15 years of software development experience, including significant work in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and mobile platforms. However, the resume reflects a career path strictly focused on Individual Contributor (IC) and technical leadership roles. He lacks the required minimum of 2 years of formal people management experience, such as conducting regular 1:1s, setting performance expectations, and leading organizational change, which are critical for a Level II Engineering Manager position.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience across varied stacks, easily meeting the 8-year minimum requirement.
Strong background in engineering productivity, having built test runners, TDD libraries, and maintained CI/CD pipelines.
Demonstrated mobile platform knowledge, including iOS application development and mobile device orchestration tooling.
concerns: Completely lacks the required minimum of 2 years in formal people management and team leadership.
No demonstrated experience conducting regular one-on-ones, performance management, or setting organizational expectations.
Lacks the preferred 3 years of experience leading broad organizational change, focusing instead on technical implementation.
